name: stage2-rvv-runtime-scalar-cmp-masked-standalone-reduce-add-executable-artifact-abi-boundary
title: Stage2 RVV runtime-scalar-cmp masked standalone reduce-add executable artifact ABI boundary
description: Hermes direction brief: make the runtime-scalar-cmp masked standalone reduce-add selected-body route executable as generated RVV artifacts with truthful ABI/runtime evidence, or harden the executable artifact/ABI boundary to fail closed when runtime scalar compare, computed mask, inactive-lane, additive seed/accumulator, dtype/config, header/prototype, ABI, or runtime AVL/VL facts are stale or missing.
